title: Oh More Wandering Trades
description: Wandering Traders can trade more types of items.
body:
**![](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/description/1308330/description_00e16faf-4027-4290-9dc3-62c2157ed6dc.png)** # **Oh More Wandering Trades**
**Welcome to the Oh More Wandering Trades!** This super simple mod gives Wandering Traders **70+ stuff to trade** — useful stuff, silly stuff, and everything in between. At least, for the wandering traders, they will not have just two leads for players! Enjoy! :) This mod is built on **Minecraft 1.21.4 NeoForge**, with priority support for **1.21.x and 1.20.x NeoForge** versions. Support for Forge and Fabric is currently **not guaranteed**. If you have any issues, please leave a comment on **CurseForge**! | Price | Item | Count | Trades until disabled | |--|--|--|--| | 5 | Ender Pearl | 1 | 3 | | 4 | Torch | 16 | 6 | | 5 | Honey Bottle | 1 | 3 | | 4 | Honeycomb | 1 | 8 | | 5 | Powder Snow Bucket | 1 | 2 | | 6 | Cake | 1 | 2 | | 1 | Candles | 1 | 5 | | 32 | Ancient Debris | 1 | 2 | | 5 | Wet Sponge | 1 | 8 | | 4 | Brush | 1 | 2 | | 1 | Feather | 3 | 5 | | 2 | Leather | 3 | 8 | | 1 | String | 5 | 8 | | 1 | Flint | 3 | 5 | | 3 | Flower Pot | 1 | 5 | | 1 | Porkchop | 2 | 5 | | 1 | Cooked Porkchop | 1 | 10 | | 2 | Beef | 3 | 5 | | 1 | Steak | 1 | 10 | | 1 | Raw Chicken | 2 | 5 | | 1 | Cooked Chicken | 1 | 10 | | 3 | Raw Rabbit | 4 | 2 | | 1 | Cooked Rabbit | 1 | 10 | | 1 | Raw Mutten | 1 | 8 | | 1 | Cooked Mutten | 1 | 10 | | 2 | Raw Copper | 1 | 8 | | 3 | Raw Iron | 1 | 6 | | 5 | Raw Gold | 1 | 4 | | 2 | Lead | 1 | 2 | | 10 | Music Disc | 1 | 1 | | 4 | Saddle | 1 | 2 | | 4 | Name Tag | 1 | 3 | | 1 | Bone Meal | 8 | 4 | | 2 | Cobweb | 1 | 5 | | 4 | Phantom Membrane | 1 | 3 | | 1 | Brick | 2 | 5 | | 1 | Bone | 2 | 3 | | 1 | Dead Bush | 1 | 5 | | 1 | Stone | 4 | 4 | | 1 | Granite | 4 | 4 | | 1 | Diorite | 4 | 4 | | 1 | Andesite | 4 | 4 | | 1 | Deepslate | 4 | 4 | | 1 | Tuff | 4 | 4 | | 1 | Calcite | 4 | 4 | | 1 | Dripstone Block | 4 | 4 | | 1 | Grass Block | 2 | 1 | | 1 | Mycelium | 2 | 1 | | 1 | Short Grass | 8 | 4 | | 1 | Tall Grass | 8 | 4 | | 1 | Large Fern | 4 | 2 | | 5 | Prismarine Shard | 4 | 4 | | 5 | Prismarine Crystals | 4 | 4 | | 5 | Echo Shard | 4 | 4 | | 4 | Turtle Scute | 1 | 3 | | 2 | Glow Ink Sac | 1 | 5 | | 1 | Ink Sac | 1 | 5 | | 2 | Bamboo | 8 | 4 | | 2 | Wind Charge | 1 | 4 | | 3 | Gloden Apple | 1 | 3 | | 5 | Gloden Apple | 1 | 3 | | 16 | Enchanted Gloden Apple | 1 | 2 | | 28 | Enchanted Gloden Apple | 1 | 2 | | 3 | Bottle O' Enchanting | 1 | 10 | | 5 | Sheild | 1 | 2 | | 1 | Iron Nugget | 5 | 5 | | 2 | Glod Nugget | 5 | 5 | | 3 | Campfire | 1 | 5 | | 3 | Soul Campfire | 1 | 5 | | ??
